mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dish (name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT category_id, create_time, create_user, description, id, image, name, price, status, update_time, update_user FROM dish WHERE dish.category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT dish.id, dish.name, dish.category_id, dish.price, dish.image, dish.description, dish.status, dish.update_time, category.name AS category_name FROM dish LEFT JOIN category ON dish.category_id = category.id WHERE dish.id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_user, create_user FROM dish WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM setmeal_dish INNER JOIN setmeal ON setmeal_dish.setmeal_id = setmeal.id WHERE setmeal_dish.dish_id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.category_id, d.price, d.image, d.status, d.description, d.create_time, d.update_time, df.id AS flavor_id, df.dish_id AS flavor_dish_id, df.name AS flavor_name, df.value AS flavor_value FROM dish d LEFT JOIN dish_flavor df ON d.id = df.dish_id WHERE d.category_id = #{categoryId} AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
